notes:
All 3 game modes of the game work fine. Performance is smooth and the music sounds good.

One complaint is it's impossible to return to the main menu in-game (escpae doesn't work) so I need to alt+tab away and kill the process to go back and select a different game mode. I think that is enough to dock down from platinum to silver.
title: SUPER KINKY

notes: Runs PERFECTLY. The mouse doesn't work upon launch, just disconnect and reconnect it. There is no use for the Escape button in this game. If you want to exit this mode, die and look behind you, you will see a "Exit the Arena" prompt.
title: SUPER KINKY
